name: BOM Item-node
label: Node
description: The Kit Content Node that this BOM component maps to. Set automatically when this BOM is generated from a Kit Content Mapping. Previously stored as a breadcrumb path; now a Link to the node master for navigability — the field value is just the direct node name.

name: BOM-explosion_level
label: Explosion Level
description: Populated automatically on every FG BOM generated from a Kit Content Mapping. "Fully Exploded" when the BOM is broken down to purchase-level items; otherwise "From - <comma-separated names of the direct Subassemblies left unexploded as line items>".

name: Sales Order-custom_material_status
label: Material Status
options:
Reprioritize
Inspected
Ready to Dispatch
Needs Attention
Possible to Push
Planning Pending
description: Computed operational status resolved by a fixed precedence chain (see playground/playground/sales_order_hooks.py). Read-only: set by the hourly scheduler and targeted recompute hooks (reservation submit/cancel, snapshot submit, SO save). Blank means none of the six rules matched.

name: Sales Order-custom_inspection_completed
label: Inspection Completed
description: Manual tick set once the order has passed inspection. Drives the "Inspected" Material Status (rank 2, outranks Ready to Dispatch).

name: Sales Order-delivery_date_revision_count
label: Delivery Date Revision Count
description: Counts how many times custom_updated_delivery_date changed via a standard Sales Order form/controller save. Intentionally does NOT count FGSRM's Dispatch Priority Date edits (those use db.set_value and bypass validate). >4 drives "Needs Attention" (rank 4).

name: Journal Entry-custom_linked_sales_invoice
label: Linked Sales Invoice
description: One or more Sales Invoices this (non-COGS) expense is attributed to (multi-select via the Expense Sales Invoice child table), so expenses can be tagged against specific customer invoices for reporting.

name: Journal Entry-custom_expense_customer
label: Expense Customer
description: Optional customer this expense is attributed to, for grouping non-COGS expenses. Manual entry - no longer auto-fetched, since Linked Sales Invoice now accepts multiple invoices that may span customers.

name: Purchase Invoice-custom_linked_sales_invoice
label: Linked Sales Invoice
description: One or more Sales Invoices this (non-COGS) expense is attributed to (multi-select via the Expense Sales Invoice child table), so expenses can be tagged against specific customer invoices for reporting.

name: Purchase Invoice-custom_expense_customer
label: Expense Customer
description: Optional customer this expense is attributed to, for grouping non-COGS expenses. Manual entry - no longer auto-fetched, since Linked Sales Invoice now accepts multiple invoices that may span customers.

name: Purchase Order-custom_closing_reason
label: Closing Reason
description: Reason captured when the Purchase Order was closed via the list-view bulk "Close Purchase Orders" action. Read-only audit trail; blank if closed by other means or without a reason.

name: Purchase Invoice-custom_is_price_adjustment_debit_note
label: Is Price Adjustment Debit Note
description: Tick when this Debit Note is a retrospective price/rate reduction only (no physical stock return). Adds a GL reclassification moving the base purchase value from Stock Received But Not Billed to the Purchase Rate Adjustment account (see playground.playground.overrides.purchase_invoice). allow_on_submit so historical debit notes can be flagged for the one-time cleanup patch.

name: Company-custom_purchase_rate_adjustment_account
label: Purchase Rate Adjustment Account
description: Expense (P&L) account credited when a Price Adjustment Debit Note reclassifies value out of Stock Received But Not Billed. A credit balance here represents a reduction in purchase cost from retrospective supplier price adjustments. Must belong to this Company.
